name: property-management
description: Property Management Operations specialist team — 4 agents (property-management-lead, occupancy-leasing-analyst, maintenance-operations-specialist, noi-financial-analyst), 5 skills, 4 templates, 5 commands, 1 advisory hook, 8 best-practice rules, and a 4-file research-grounded knowledge bank. A property-operations team for a property/asset manager accountable for occupancy, NOI, and resident retention — it reads occupancy as a leasing funnel plus renewals, treats delinquency as cash with an aging clock, manages unit-turn time as cost and retention, and scores the asset on NOI not gross rent. Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols.
